_description: Static carry inputs. Updated manually after central bank decisions.

_signal_quality.fx: REAL — interest rate differential from published policy rates
_signal_quality.rate: APPROXIMATE — yield estimated from price, rolldown from maturity math
_signal_quality.commodity: PROXY — 60-day trailing return, conflates carry with momentum
_signal_quality.equity_index: NOT_AVAILABLE — needs dividend yield + financing rate (v2)

6J.note: CME 6J = JPY per USD inverted; long 6J = long JPY

6E.note: CME 6E = EUR per USD inverted; long 6E = long EUR

6B.note: CME 6B = GBP per USD inverted; long 6B = long GBP

financing_rate.source: Fed Funds proxy (same as USD policy rate)
